summary: Tested Multi-currency support and Mobile responsive features for B2B Travel Platform. All features working correctly - 11/11 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. Currency selector works globally, prices convert correctly across all pages, mobile hamburger menu and responsive layouts work as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: CurrencyContext.jsx correctly implements currency conversion with localStorage persistence (travo_currency key)
Currency API (routes/currency.py) properly fetches live rates from open.er-api.com with 1-hour caching and fallback rates
Header.jsx correctly implements responsive hamburger menu (lg:hidden) with slide panel animation
MyBookings.jsx uses useCurrency().format() for all price displays with proper conversion
BookingDetail.jsx uses useCurrency().formatPrice() for payment details and summary
AdminDashboard.jsx uses useCurrency for bookings tab prices
Mobile responsive grids use proper Tailwind breakpoints (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All currency and mobile features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-currency and mobile responsive features are fully functional. Currency selector in top header bar (dark blue) works globally. Supported currencies: AED (default), USD, EUR, GBP, INR. localStorage key is 'travo_currency'. Hamburger menu appears on screens < 1024px (lg breakpoint). All 5 booking status stages render correctly in tracker.

backend_apis.GET /api/currency/rates: PASSED - Returns live exchange rates for AED, USD, EUR, GBP, INR with metadata
backend_apis.Currency rates base: PASSED - AED is base currency with rate 1
backend_apis.Currency metadata: PASSED - Includes symbol, name, flag for each currency
backend_apis.Exchange rate values: PASSED - Rates within reasonable ranges (USD ~0.27, EUR ~0.23, GBP ~0.20, INR ~25)
backend_apis.GET /api/held-bookings: PASSED - Returns bookings with total_price field
backend_apis.GET /api/held-bookings/{id}: PASSED - Returns booking detail with price

frontend_ui.Currency selector in header (desktop): PASSED - Shows AED by default, dropdown with all 5 currencies
frontend_ui.Currency selector in header (mobile): PASSED - Visible and functional on mobile
frontend_ui.Currency switching updates prices: PASSED - Prices convert correctly when currency changed
frontend_ui.Booking Detail prices: PASSED - Payment details and summary show converted amounts
frontend_ui.Mobile slide panel: PASSED - Opens with all nav items including submenus
frontend_ui.My Leads submenu expansion: PASSED - Expands to show My Bookings option
frontend_ui.Mobile Booking Detail header: PASSED - Shows 2-column grid for guest info
frontend_ui.Booking status tracker (5 stages): PASSED - Renders Hold, Payment Pending, Payment Received, Confirmed, Ticketed

mocked_apis_note: None - Currency API uses live exchange rates from open.er-api.com with fallback
